overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit futuristic city. The player character walks along covered sidewalks, crosses intersections, and passes under overpasses with large digital billboards while pedestrians and vehicles populate the rain-slicked streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with seating and neon advertising

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered pedestrian walkway, passing benches and neon advertisements on the left

notable_agents.action: pedestrian sitting on a bench near the wall

entered.detail: overhead concrete and metal roof structure covering the pedestrian path
red colored pedestrian walkway strip running along the sidewalk
black metal benches with people sitting along the left wall
large illuminated digital billboards displaying colorful advertisements
metal railing separating the pedestrian walkway from the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a covered pedestrian walkway at night, illuminated by vibrant neon advertisements. The player walks forward along a red carpet path, passing metal benches where NPCs sit. The street is visible to the right, separated by a guard rail, with sparse vehicle traffic passing by.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection crosswalk with yellow markings

events.description: exits covered walkway and steps onto the street crosswalk with yellow striped markings
black SUV and other vehicles drive past on the road while crossing the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the intersection, navigating between moving vehicles

notable_agents.action: black SUV driving through the intersection, followed by other cars

entered.detail: bold yellow striped crosswalk lines painted on the asphalt
dark wet asphalt road surface reflecting neon lights
tall pole with traffic signals and a yellow cross symbol

segments.scene_description: The player exits the covered walkway and enters a wide urban intersection, crossing the street on yellow-marked crosswalks. Vehicles including a black SUV drive past on the wet asphalt as the player navigates across. The traffic light pole stands prominently in the center of the crossing area.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with storefronts and neon signage

events.description: reaches the opposite sidewalk and continues walking along the concrete pavement

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk, passing various pedestrians and storefront displays

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white jacket walking toward the camera

entered.detail: grey concrete pavement tiles of the sidewalk
illuminated shop windows and neon signs along the building facades

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the street, the player walks along a concrete sidewalk lined with neon-lit storefronts. Pedestrians walk in opposing directions, and the street guard rail runs along the right side. The atmosphere is dense with urban nightlife and moderate foot traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: underpass with massive overhead digital billboards

events.description: enters covered underpass area with large overhead digital billboard displays spanning the road

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass, looking up at the massive digital displays overhead

entered.detail: massive structure spanning the street with multiple large digital screens displaying advertisements
thick concrete pillars supporting the overpass structure

segments.scene_description: The player enters a semi-covered underpass dominated by a massive overhead digital billboard bridge spanning the street. Concrete support pillars line the walkway, and the area is bathed in the glow of multiple large digital screens. Vehicles continue to pass on the road to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: open commercial street with graffiti walls and distant towers

events.description: exits the underpass into a more open area with view of distant futuristic towers and palm trees
graffiti-covered wall becomes prominent feature on the left side of the walkway

agents.ego_description: walking along the open sidewalk, passing pedestrians with futuristic towers visible in the distance

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: dark wall covered in bright green and yellow graffiti tags
tall industrial towers and skyscrapers visible in the distance against the night sky
tall palm trees silhouetted against the city lights in the distance

segments.scene_description: Exiting the underpass, the scene opens up to reveal distant futuristic towers and palm trees against the night sky. A graffiti-covered wall runs along the left side of the walkway, while pedestrians walk ahead. The street continues with moderate traffic and neon-lit storefronts visible further down.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-drenched futuristic city, moving from a sheltered walkway into the open expanse of a bustling urban district. It begins on a covered pedestrian path with a red carpet and vibrant advertisements, moving past seated NPCs toward the edge of the street. As the camera exits the shelter, it crosses a wide, rain-slicked intersection marked with yellow lines while vehicles pass by on the wet asphalt. The scene then shifts to a concrete sidewalk lined with glowing storefronts and pedestrians before entering a semi-covered underpass dominated by a massive overhead digital billboard bridge. Finally, the camera emerges from the underpass to reveal a wide vista of distant futuristic towers and palm trees against the night sky, passing a graffiti-covered wall as the city opens up.
